relationships: ber:Aseggas ay d-yetteddun, ad qefleɣ mraw sa n yiseggasen
ber:Ken ad yeqfel mraw semmus n yiseggasen aseggas ay d-yetteddun
ber:Aseggas ay d-yetteddun, ad teqfel mraw n sa n yiseggasen
ber:Ulac ccek dakken Paul yella yesεa mraw kuẓ n yiseggasen
ber:Yanni yesεa mraw n tmikin aya segmi i d-yuɣal s axxam
ber:Taqcict-nni, meskint, tella akken kan ay teqfel mraw tam n yiseggasen
ber:Ma d tur-a, wwḍen mraw kraḍ n yisragen segmi ulac Internet
ber:Tom yules yesfaydi-d seg tlelli tawtilant deg sin n yigiman ed mraw kraḍ
ber:Tom iɛawed yesfaydi-s seg tlelli tawtilant deg sin n yigiman ed mraw kraḍ
